tests.name: Homepage loads correctly
tests.description: Verify the homepage/onboarding page loads without errors

tests.name: Onboarding slide 1 content renders
tests.description: Verify first onboarding slide shows Organize Your Life title

tests.name: Onboarding slide navigation buttons present
tests.description: Verify Next button exists on onboarding slides

tests.name: Onboarding multi-slide content available
tests.description: Verify all 3 onboarding slides content is defined

tests.name: Skip button visibility on onboarding
tests.description: Verify Skip button is present on non-final onboarding slides

tests.name: Get Started CTA button present
tests.description: Verify Get Started button on the final onboarding slide

tests.name: Login page layout renders correctly
tests.description: Verify login page shows Welcome Back title, subtitle, fields, submit

tests.name: Register page layout renders correctly
tests.description: Verify register page shows Create Account title with fields

tests.name: Dark theme applied as default
tests.description: Verify the app uses dark theme as default color scheme

tests.name: Glassmorphism CSS styling applied
tests.description: Verify glass-panel class with backdrop-filter blur on UI panels

tests.name: Animated background component renders
tests.description: Verify AnimatedBackground component renders on auth pages

tests.name: Login form has email and password fields
tests.description: Verify login form has both email and password input fields

tests.name: Sign Up navigation link on login page
tests.description: Verify Sign up link on login page pointing to /register

tests.name: Sign In navigation link on register page
tests.description: Verify Sign in link on register page pointing to /login

tests.name: Page title contains application name
tests.description: Verify browser tab title contains Core Scheduler

tests.name: Favicon loads correctly
tests.description: Verify favicon/icon resource is referenced in HTML head

tests.name: Meta description tag present
tests.description: Verify meta description tag exists with SEO content

tests.name: Inter font family loaded
tests.description: Verify Google Font Inter is loaded and applied to body

tests.name: CSS design system variables defined
tests.description: Verify CSS custom properties like --accent-primary in :root

tests.name: Button hover effects CSS applied
tests.description: Verify btn-primary with hover transform and box-shadow

tests.name: Input field focus styling works
tests.description: Verify input fields show accent border and shadow on focus

tests.name: Error message styling with danger color
tests.description: Verify error messages use var(--danger) color for feedback

tests.name: Success message styling with success color
tests.description: Verify success messages use var(--success) color

tests.name: Loading spinner animation defined
tests.description: Verify CSS spin animation keyframes for loading states

tests.name: Responsive viewport meta tag present
tests.description: Verify meta viewport with width=device-width for mobile

tests.description: Verify successful login redirects to dashboard

tests.description: Verify failed login shows error message on screen

tests.description: Verify HTML5 validation prevents empty email submission

tests.description: Verify HTML5 validation prevents empty password submission

tests.description: Verify Forgot password link is visible and clickable

tests.description: Verify back navigation from forgot password mode returns to login

tests.description: Verify register step 1 shows name and email fields

tests.name: Registration link from login page works
tests.description: Verify Sign up link navigates to /register page

tests.description: Verify unauthenticated users are redirected to /login

tests.description: Verify authenticated users can access the dashboard
